title: Default and Direct Exchanges, Work Queues, and Fair Dispatch · Type Forensics
summary: An incident engineer receives a plausible but defective direct-routing work distribution service; preserve message identity and timing, locate the first broken ownership boundary, and retain a deterministic regression case. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in direct-routing work distribution service and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Explain the default exchange queue-name binding and choose it only when direct queue-name coupling is intentional.
Design direct exchange bindings that keep producer intent stable while consumer queues evolve.
Use one queue with multiple consumers for load distribution and state that each delivery goes to one active consumer at a time.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Order the regression proof · Debug Worker Effect Evidence
steps.instruction:
Order the Worker Effect Evidence RabbitMQ and TypeScript messaging evidence cycle for this debug task before implementing it.

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Order the regression proof · Debug Worker Effect Evidence.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Worker Effect Evidence assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Order the regression proof · Debug Worker Effect Evidence, keep Worker Effect Evidence connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.

content.text: A debug messaging team handles case 6238 in a multi-tenant case event backbone with three subscriber responsibilities. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to combine direct routing, worker capacity, and acknowledgement-after-effect evidence; separate browser evidence from disposable live-broker proof; then add one subscriber responsibility without changing publisher intent. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Acknowledge only after a durable effect or safely repeatable handoff and retain message identity, attempt, result, and failure evidence.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Worker Effect Evidence has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Acknowledge only after a durable effect or safely repeatable handoff and retain message identity, attempt, result, and failure evidence.

hints: For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Publish the incident record · Debug Worker Effect Evidence, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Worker Effect Evidence precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At RabbitMQ and TypeScript Publish the incident record · Debug Worker Effect Evidence, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A debug messaging team handles case 1190 in a multi-tenant case event backbone with three subscriber responsibilities. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to combine direct routing, worker capacity, and acknowledgement-after-effect evidence; separate browser evidence from disposable live-broker proof; then introduce a sequence gap for one partition while another stays healthy. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Acknowledge only after a durable effect or safely repeatable handoff and retain message identity, attempt, result, and failure evidence.

For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Publish the incident record · Debug Worker Effect Evidence, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: A worker should acknowledge before starting slow work to prevent duplicates.
